intro: The intersection between Science and Art — STEAM integrated within our complete Montessori Method, developed with experts in Singapore and the UK to build future-ready skills.

steamPillars.title: Science — Inquiry and Exploration
steamPillars.description: Children are natural scientists. Through sensory exploration and practical life activities, they observe, question, and discover the world around them.

steamPillars.title: Technology — Creativity and Innovation
steamPillars.description: Modern tools are woven into purposeful Montessori activities, encouraging creative problem-solving and digital literacy from an early age.

steamPillars.title: Engineering — Building and Problem-solving
steamPillars.description: Constructive play with blocks, gears, and design challenges helps children build, test, and refine their solutions.

steamPillars.title: Arts — Expression and Design
steamPillars.description: Creative freedom combined with design thinking allows children to express themselves through art, music, and imaginative play.

steamPillars.title: Mathematics — Logic and Precision
steamPillars.description: Concrete Montessori math materials guide children from counting to abstract concepts like division, multiplication, and decimals.

montessoriAreas.title: Practical Life
montessoriAreas.description: Everyday activities using tongs, pegs, and jugs promote gross and fine motor skills, concentration, and independence.

montessoriAreas.title: Sensorial
montessoriAreas.description: Materials refine the five senses through texture, sound, taste, smell, size, and colour discrimination.

montessoriAreas.title: Language
montessoriAreas.description: A print-rich environment encourages alphabet recognition, phonetic reading, grammar, and writing activities.

montessoriAreas.title: Number Work
montessoriAreas.description: A systematic approach from concrete counting to abstract numeracy concepts builds a solid mathematical foundation.

montessoriAreas.title: Culture
montessoriAreas.description: Art, music, biology, botany, zoology, history, and geography foster global awareness and appreciation.
